positive: A vibrant, geometric illustration of a friendly, mystical forest creature (like a stylized owl or fox) sitting on a crystalline branch. The background is a stylized nebula composed of deep sapphire blues, teal, and iridescent violet, giving the illusion of depth. The foreground elements are highly detailed, using clean, strong outlines and contrasting solid colors. The composition is symmetrical and centered, with the creature as the focal point. Style is Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with Mid-Century Modern poster art, rendered with flat graphic blocks and sharp edges, ideal for screen printing on apparel. Dramatic, yet cheerful, lighting highlights the creature's silhouette. Minimalist, highly scalable vector aesthetic.
negative: photo, realistic, noisy, grainy, blur, watermark, signature, text, logo, words, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, low detail, dirty, messy, messy lines
